summary: Frontend-only SSR validation completed for public Next.js routes on branch 1203 preview URL. All requested routes rendered with HTTP 200 and visible public header/navigation.

integration_issues.flow: Public page load with third-party translation script
integration_issues.issue: Console shows repeated CORS failures and fatal errors from multilipi endpoints (getLanguages_mode), although page rendering remains functional.

issues: Next/Image quality warnings in console: multiple image quality values (72/82/85) are not included in configured images.qualities.

action_items: Fix or disable failing multilipi translation script integration in preview/public pages to remove runtime console errors.
Align next/image quality config with actual quality values used by public images to remove warnings.
Retest the same 4 public routes after third-party script fix to ensure no hidden client/runtime regressions.
critical_code_review_comments: Fallback strategy for pages/menu/home sections is correctly guarded by GREETERS_USE_DUMP_FALLBACK and prevents SSR hard-failure without Postgres.
Header repository fallback logic is resilient, but third-party script errors are currently polluting runtime logs and should be isolated from critical render path.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated via browser automation on https://greeters-preview.preview.emergentagent.com for /, /contact, /qui-sommes-nous, /galerie. All 200 and SSR/public shell visible; check console log path for third-party CORS/fatal errors.
rca of the issue: Reproduction: open /contact or /qui-sommes-nous and inspect browser console. Root cause: multilipi third-party script requests to multilipiseo-2.multilipi.com fail preflight CORS, followed by script-level fatal fetch errors (null response handling). Mitigation: remove/defer this script on preview/public pages or ensure provider-side CORS + robust null/error handling before json() parsing.
